name: Greenlane Renewables Inc.
description: Greenlane Renewables Inc. is a leading global provider of biogas upgrading systems that clean and purify raw biogas, derived from organic waste sources such as landfills, wastewater treatment plants, dairy farms, and food waste, into high-value biomethane or renewable natural gas (RNG). The company offers multiple core upgrading technologies, including water wash, pressure swing adsorption, and membrane separation, helping customers reduce greenhouse gas emissions and meet decarbonization targets.
